summary: Iteration 46: Promotional Mailing / Campaign Module - Full testing completed. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/mailings returns campaigns list with count
VERIFIED: POST /api/mailings creates draft campaign with auto-filled defaults
VERIFIED: PUT /api/mailings/{id} updates draft campaign fields and programs
VERIFIED: DELETE /api/mailings/{id} deletes draft campaign (returns 404 after)
VERIFIED: POST /api/mailings/preview-recipients returns relevant schools based on program target_groups matching school tags
VERIFIED: POST /api/mailings/{id}/send triggers background sending and creates recipient records with snapshots
VERIFIED: GET /api/mailings/{id} returns full campaign detail with recipients and programs
VERIFIED: POST /api/mailings/default-texts?audience=ms returns MŠ default Czech template
VERIFIED: POST /api/mailings/default-texts?audience=zs returns ZŠ default Czech template
VERIFIED: POST /api/mailings/default-texts?audience=ss returns SŠ default Czech template
VERIFIED: GET /api/mailings/templates/defaults returns all 4 templates (ms, zs, ss, general)
VERIFIED: Authentication required for all mailing endpoints (401/403 without auth)
VERIFIED: Frontend /admin/mailings page loads with title 'Propagační mailingy'
VERIFIED: 'Mailingy' nav item appears in sidebar under 'Školy'
VERIFIED: 'Zájemci' button appears on /admin/bookings page header (NOT in sidebar)
VERIFIED: Campaign wizard opens with 4 steps (Programy, Příjemci, Text emailu, Odeslání)
VERIFIED: 'Rozeslat nabídku' button appears on program cards at /admin/programs
VERIFIED: Clicking 'Rozeslat nabídku' navigates to /admin/mailings?program=ID with pre-selected program
VERIFIED: Wizard pre-fills campaign name as 'Nabídka: {program_name}' when opened from Programs page
VERIFIED: Recipient preview shows warnings about schools without tags (20 škol nemá vyplněné kategorie)
VERIFIED: Template buttons (Obecná, MS, ZS, SS) work in step 3 to load default texts
VERIFIED: Campaign sending creates recipient records with matching_reason and programs snapshots
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test campaigns during testing (names prefixed with TEST_). Some were cleaned up, some remain for audit trail (sent campaigns).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mailing Campaign Module fully implemented and tested. Key features: (1) Campaign CRUD with draft/sending/sent/partial/failed statuses, (2) 4 recipient selection modes (relevant_only, all, manual, relevant_plus_manual), (3) Relevance engine maps program target_groups (ms_3_6, zs1_7_12, etc.) to school tags (MŠ, ZŠ, SŠ), (4) Default Czech templates for MŠ/ZŠ/SŠ/general audiences, (5) Background email sending via Resend API, (6) Full audit trail with content/selection/programs snapshots, (7) Two entry points: direct from Mailings page and from Programs page 'Rozeslat nabídku' button.
